programs.title: Ice Road Rescue
programs.desc: When a salmon truck crashes into a ditch, it kicks off a night of havoc for Thord; with truck drivers in trouble all over his territory, Thord's team is pushed to the limit.

programs.title: X-Ray Earth
programs.desc: Scientists examine a large fault line off the coast of the Pacific Northwest and the possible devastation that could result from a megaquake and tsunami.

programs.title: X-Ray Earth
programs.desc: X-raying the Earth reveals the largest volcano on the planet lies beneath Yellowstone National Park, and it could plunge the Earth into a volcanic winter.

programs.title: X-Ray Earth
programs.desc: X-Raying the Earth reveals an Atlantic island that could collapse in a mega-landslide, sending a killer tsunami headed straight for the U.S. East Coast.

programs.title: Hostile Planet
programs.desc: The highest mountains on Earth are home to snow leopards, golden eagles, mountain goats, barnacle goslings, and gelada monkeys; only the toughest of animals can endure the extreme weather, scarce food supplies and limited oxygen on these peaks.

programs.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programs.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!
